title: Zero-Day
Threat Engine
description: Real-time threat ingestion engine for a Fortune 500 SOC. Reduced triage latency by 64% through a custom Rust event loop processing 100k+ events/sec. E2E encrypted, zero-trust architecture.

title: Quantum-
Resistant Auth
description: Post-quantum authentication backend processing 10M+ daily logins. CRYSTALS-Kyber key encapsulation under the hood. Hardened against timing side-channels and state exhaustion attacks.

title: Distributed
Identity Mesh
description: Federated identity mesh for 2.4M users across 14 internal VPCs. Eliminated lateral movement vectors entirely. Built on a containerized microservice architecture. FedRAMP Moderate aligned.

title: Global Edge
WAF Controller
description: High-throughput control plane for a global WAF. Live traffic rule propagation under 2 seconds worldwide. Written in Go, deployed via Terraform across 45 edge regions.
